Metadata.title: Feyzo Logistics | Freight Forwarding & Customs Clearance Management
Metadata.description: Feyzo Logistics is an international freight forwarder offering integrated logistics and customs clearance management—with a focus on shipping to Syria and coordination through Lattakia port. We manage the customs pathway through our network of licensed professional brokers while you retain a single point of contact. Reliable cross-border cargo, transparent communication, and end-to-end supply chain support.
Metadata.ogDescription: International freight forwarding and customs clearance management for Syria and Lattakia port. One partner coordinates licensed brokerage professionals for compliant, seamless cargo flow.

Hero.headline:
Streamlined Logistics
Delivered with Excellence
Hero.heroImageAlt: Logistics and freight operations — Feyzo Logistics
Hero.subheadline: International freight forwarding with an asset-light, partner-orchestrated model. As your single point of contact, we coordinate certified specialists worldwide—connecting your business with precision, clarity, and care.

Services.title: What we do
Services.subtitle: Core capabilities built on reliability, transparency, and coordinated execution. You work with one accountable partner; we manage and oversee licensed specialists across the chain.

items.title: International freight forwarding
items.description: We coordinate air, ocean, and road moves as your international freight forwarder—clear milestones, proactive updates, and accountable handoffs across our vetted carrier network.

items.title: Warehousing
items.description: Secure storage, inventory visibility, and fulfillment aligned to your SLAs.

items.title: Customs Clearance Management & Compliance
items.description: We manage the entire customs process through our network of licensed professional brokers. As your single point of contact, we coordinate documentation, facilitate filings, consult on classification, and oversee clearance milestones—so your cargo keeps moving while authorized customs experts execute formalities in accordance with applicable regulations.

items.title: Last-mile delivery
items.description: Final delivery scheduling that respects your customers’ expectations.

About.title: About Feyzo
About.body: Feyzo Logistics is an international freight forwarder and a member of the Syrian International Freight Forwarding Association (SIFFA). We act as your strategic logistics partner, coordinating with authorized customs experts to ensure seamless cargo flow. As your single point of contact, we oversee integrated forwarding, warehousing, and customs clearance management—predictable handoffs, candid communication, and measurable performance aligned with your timelines and reporting needs, wherever you ship regionally or across borders.

Contact.title: Ready to ship?
Contact.body: Tell us about your lanes, volumes, and deadlines. We will respond with a clear next step.
Contact.address: Latakia Governorate, The Goldsmiths' Market, Syria
